weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 21 total findings, with 12 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-4851, CVE-2026-5020, and CVE-2016-20037, among others. The most active day was March 29, 2026, with multiple security domains affected, including Containers, Crypto Libraries, and OS/Kernel, as well as development platforms such as Maven/Java, npm/Node, and PyPI/Python. The diversity of affected domains and the range of CVEs suggest a complex and dynamic threat environment, underscoring the need for continued vigilance and proactive security measures to protect our infrastructure.
